raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output walks the argument chain end-to-end, identifies and addresses multiple inconsistencies, and provides clear recommendations.",
    "R1.4": "The output maps against the nearest works (OLTP, OLAP) and articulates sharp vs rhetorical differences effectively.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is polished with improved clarity and reduced redundancy; the revised text reads smoothly without loss of meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Each recommendation includes a clear assessment of confidence and identifies missing evidence or assumptions.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, providing detailed recommendations for improvement.",
    "RX.4": "There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced; minor rephrasing does not introduce regressions.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, making the traceability clear."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output walks the argument chain end-to-end, identifies and addresses multiple inconsistencies, and provides clear recommendations.
rationale.R1.4: The output maps against the nearest works (OLTP, OLAP) and articulates sharp vs rhetorical differences effectively.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished with improved clarity and reduced redundancy; the revised text reads smoothly without loss of meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Each recommendation includes a clear assessment of confidence and identifies missing evidence or assumptions.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, providing detailed recommendations for improvement.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced; minor rephrasing does not introduce regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, making the traceability clear.
